mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( IDX, USER_ID, USER_PWD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, POSITION, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( MEMBER_SEQUENCE.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{user_pwd}, #{user_name}, #{email}, #{position}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID=#{user_id}
SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID=#{user_id} AND USER_PWD=#{user_pwd}
